assertion_results.text: Step 8 Case A creates standard remediation tasks for the current stream (rhtpa-2.2) with standard labels ['ai-generated-jira', 'Security', 'CVE-2026-55123'] and 'Depend' link to TC-8020
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md Case A section creates two tasks for rhtpa-2.2. Task 1 (upstream backport) and Task 2 (downstream propagation) both use labels: ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123"]. Post-creation instructions for both tasks specify: 'Link ... task to TC-8020 with "Depend" link type'.

assertion_results.text: Step 8 Case B detects that stream rhtpa-2.1 is also affected but has no CVE Jira — creates proactive preemptive remediation tasks (§1.60)
assertion_results.evidence: cross-stream.md states: 'Specifically, no CVE Jira exists for stream rhtpa-2.1. This triggers Case B (preemptive remediation).' remediation.md confirms: 'Case B: Stream rhtpa-2.1 (out-of-scope) is also affected, and no CVE Jira exists for rhtpa-2.1 — create preemptive remediation tasks'. Two preemptive tasks (upstream backport and downstream propagation) are created for rhtpa-2.1.

assertion_results.text: Preemptive tasks for stream rhtpa-2.1 include the 'security-preemptive' label alongside standard labels: ['ai-generated-jira', 'Security', 'CVE-2026-55123', 'security-preemptive']
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md Preemptive Task 1 specifies labels: ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123", "security-preemptive"]. Preemptive Task 2 specifies the same labels. cross-stream.md table also confirms both preemptive tasks have labels 'ai-generated-jira, Security, CVE-2026-55123, security-preemptive'.

assertion_results.text: Preemptive tasks are linked to the originating CVE Jira TC-8020 with 'Related' link type (not 'Depend') because the originating CVE belongs to a different stream
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md Preemptive Task 1 post-creation: 'Link preemptive task to TC-8020 with **"Related"** link type (not "Depend")'. Preemptive Task 2 post-creation: 'Link preemptive downstream task to TC-8020 with **"Related"** link type (not "Depend")'. cross-stream.md explicitly states: 'Link type: "Related" (not "Depend") to TC-8020, because TC-8020 belongs to a different stream (rhtpa-2.2)'.

assertion_results.text: Preemptive task descriptions include a preemptive remediation prefix noting TC-8020 (stream rhtpa-2.2) as the originating CVE
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md shows both preemptive task descriptions begin with the prefix: '> **Preemptive remediation**: This task was created proactively from cross-stream impact analysis of TC-8020 (stream rhtpa-2.2). No stream-specific CVE Jira exists yet for this stream. When PSIRT creates one, this task will be linked and the `security-preemptive` label removed.' This prefix explicitly names TC-8020 and stream rhtpa-2.2 as the originating CVE.
